objective: Continue full-carrier MCP parity rollout. Current ChatGPT Browser connector tool list still exposes only the older bounded tool surface after Codex implemented/staged parity tools. Inspect the updated MCP connector implementation, manifest, HTTP preview schema, active connector contract, and server startup/deployment path to determine why newly staged tools are not visible through the live ChatGPT Browser MCP connection. Required outcomes: (1) confirm whether the live MCP server needs restart/reload/redeployment or whether the public connector is still pointed at an older process/manifest; (2) start or instruct the correct local preview/tunnel exposure path as lawful under current authority, or produce exact operator instructions if a human gate is needed; (3) verify the live tool list includes ion_file_put_text, ion_artifact_upload_init, ion_artifact_upload_chunk, ion_artifact_upload_commit, ion_carrier_message_send, ion_carrier_message_poll, and ion_carrier_message_ack; (4) run focused connector tests and full-carrier capability audit; (5) if possible, create a small smoke-test artifact/message through the new tool path and record receipts; (6) return with CONTEXT PROOF, TEMPLATE ACTION PROOF, files inspected/changed, validation commands, whether the live ChatGPT Browser connector sees the new tools, remaining blockers, and next lawful moves. Preserve invariant: one ION core engine mounted by all carriers; current missing visibility of new tools is CARRIER_ADAPTER_FAILURE or deployment/reload issue unless proven to be ION_CORE_FAILURE.
